parameters.body: ={"model":"meta-llama/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct:free","messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Describe the municipal or infrastructure issue visible in this image in one detailed sentence. Focus on: road condition, water, electricity, construction, or emergency hazards. If no issue is visible, respond: No issue detected."},{"type":"image_url","image_url":{"url":"data:{{ $json.mimeType }};base64,{{ $json.base64Image }}"}}]}],"max_tokens":200}

={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.phone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"📸 Location recorded! Now please send a *photo* of the *{{ $json.issue_type }}* issue.\n\n_(Type *skip* if you cannot take a photo right now)_"}}
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.phone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"📸 Please send a *photo* of the issue or type *skip* to proceed without one."}}
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.phone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"📍 Please share your location — drop a pin or type the area name."}}

={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.phone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"👋 Welcome to Civix-Pulse!\n\nPlease describe your civic issue in detail, send a voice note, or share a photo."}}
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.phone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"Please describe your issue first before sharing a location."}}
